vulnerabilities.title: Recommended security package missing: flutter_secure_storage
vulnerabilities.description: No secure storage package detected. Sensitive values are likely persisted in plaintext.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Add flutter_secure_storage to dependencies and use it where appropriate.

vulnerabilities.title: No certificate-pinning package detected
vulnerabilities.description: None of the recognised certificate-pinning packages (ssl_pinning_plugin, http_certificate_pinning, flutter_certificate_pinning) were found. Consider pinning the TLS certificate or public key for critical endpoints.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Add a certificate-pinning package and configure it for your critical API hosts.
